summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Imperium app - Iteration 3. All new features tested: MBTI Translator, Shadow Work, Training Regimen, Nutritional Architecture, Ritual Preparations, Glossary, Hydration Tracker, Streak Tracking, Workout Logging, and 24-hour fast warning. Backend: 23/23 tests passing (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper functionality.

minor.issue: Route ordering issue - parameterized route was catching specific routes. FIXED by reordering routes.

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with 'The Imperium' title in sidebar
All 14 navigation links present and functional
Translator page: MBTI type selectors (from/to), direction toggle (outgoing/incoming), text input, translate button
Translator API: POST /api/translator/translate accepts correct payload
Shadow Work page: 8 cognitive functions grid displayed
Shadow Work page: 5 shadow chapters with expand/collapse functionality
Shadow Work page: Moral Architecture section with 8 values that expand
Training Regimen page: 4 phases with exercises and day tabs
Nutritional Architecture page: 4 tabs (Foods, Supplements, Sample Day, Hydration)
Ritual Preparations page: 4 blends with detailed ingredient sourcing info
Glossary page: 5 category tabs with search functionality
Daily Planner: Hydration tracker with +/- buttons and visual progress bar
Daily Planner: Streak card showing current streak
Hydration API: POST /api/tracking/hydration and GET /api/tracking/hydration/{date}
Streak API: GET /api/tracking/streak
Workout Log API: POST /api/tracking/workout and GET /api/tracking/workouts
Activity Log API: POST /api/tracking/activity
Warrior Practices: Workout logging dialog with exercises (name/sets/reps/duration)
Rite of Uncrowned: Prominent 24-hour fast warning box in red
GET /api/shadow returns 5 chapters with correct structure
GET /api/moral-architecture returns 8 values
GET /api/cognitive-functions returns 8 functions
GET /api/ritual-preparations returns blends, oils, burning_substances with sourcing
GET /api/training-regimen returns 4 phases with philosophy
GET /api/nutritional-architecture returns all nutrition data sections
GET /api/glossary returns 5 categories
GET /api/doctrines/expanded returns expanded doctrines with Vel'nar forms
GET /api/practices/meditations/all returns combined meditations (16 total)
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in FastAPI: Specific routes like /doctrines/expanded must be defined BEFORE parameterized routes like /doctrines/{doctrine_key} to avoid route conflicts. This was fixed during testing.
seed_data_creation: Test hydration and workout data created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 3 are working. The app now has: MBTI Translator (AI-powered via Gemini), Hydration Tracker, Streak Tracking, Workout Logging, 24-hour fast warning on Rite page, ingredient sourcing in Ritual Preparations, and new pages (Shadow Work, Training Regimen, Nutritional Architecture, Ritual Preparations, Glossary). Backend route ordering was fixed for /api/doctrines/expanded endpoint.
